tips_en: Read Paper 1 first for its novel 'reasoning shift' phenomenon—a 50% reduction in reasoning tokens with irrelevant context—which has immediate practical implications for deploying LLMs in real-world applications. Papers 1 and 3 both address inference efficiency from different angles (test-time vs. architectural), while Paper 2's findings on terminal agents complement the efficiency theme by demonstrating cost-effective agent design in enterprise settings.
tips_zh: 首先阅读第一篇论文，了解其新颖的“推理偏移”现象——在无关上下文下推理token减少50%——这对在现实环境中部署LLM具有直接的实践意义。第一篇和第三篇论文分别从不同角度（推理时与架构层面）解决推理效率问题，而第二篇论文关于终端智能体的发现则通过展示企业环境中具有成本效益的智能体设计来补充这一效率主题。
